hero.badge: Work today — job opportunities in one app
hero.title: Students and employers on the same platform, matched instantly.
hero.subtitle: Discover daily job opportunities with Ada İş Akademi, apply fast, and track your process and payouts in one app.
hero.decorativeAria: Abstract background illustration with connected nodes

suggestion.title: Smart suggestion
suggestion.body: Strengthen your profile to rank higher in daily job listings.

how.title: Fast matching in three steps
how.subtitle: From candidate onboarding to hiring approval, every step is mobile-first and trackable.

items.title: Complete your profile
items.body: Add skills, availability, and location to match with relevant listings.

items.title: Apply instantly
items.body: Apply to suitable jobs in one tap and track status in real time.

items.title: Get approved and start
items.body: Receive employer approval, view task details, and manage the process in one panel.

features.title: Not only beautiful, operationally strong
features.subtitle: The landing experience is connected to conversion goals, trust, and real product workflows.

items.title: Smart matching
items.body: Priority recommendations based on role, location, and availability.

items.title: Secure workflow
items.body: Profile verification, approval steps, and transparent status feedback.

items.title: Two-sided value
items.body: Balanced, fast, and measurable experience for both candidates and employers.

proof.caption: User feedback
proof.quote: Minutes after publishing the listing, we matched with suitable candidates. The process is both fast and transparent.
proof.author: Operations Manager, Partner Brand

cta.title: Launch today, see impact tomorrow
cta.subtitle: Start a modern hiring flow that connects candidates and employers in a single mobile experience.

login.title: Sign in
login.subtitleIndividual: Access your account to manage applications, jobs, and notifications.
login.subtitleCorporate: Sign in with your organization account to manage listings and hiring.
login.subtitleAdmin: Sign in with your administrator email and password to access the admin panel.

feedback.authNotConfigured: Authentication service endpoints are currently unavailable.
feedback.loginInvalidCredentials: Sign-in failed: this screen is for employer or candidate accounts. Your email or password may be wrong, or the account may be suspended, banned, or not active yet. Use /admin/login for an administrator account.
feedback.loginInvalidCredentialsAdmin: Administrator sign-in failed: no admin user matches this email, the password is incorrect, or the account is locked or not active. If you have an employer account, use corporate sign-in on the main site.
feedback.loginNetworkError: Could not reach the API. Ensure the server is running; in local dev the web app expects the API at http://localhost:15080.
feedback.validationRequestFailed: The request did not pass server validation. Check the fields and try again.
feedback.serverLoginDeviceRequired: Server: device identifier is missing. Refresh the page and try again; contact support if it persists.
feedback.serverLoginTypeRequired: Server: account type is invalid. Refresh the page and try again.
feedback.serverInternalError: The server hit an unexpected error. Please try again later.
feedback.genericError: Something went wrong. Please try again.
